member.name: T:Photostax.ImageFormat
member.summary: Image format enumeration.

member.name: F:Photostax.ImageFormat.Jpeg
member.summary: JPEG image format.

member.name: F:Photostax.ImageFormat.Png
member.summary: PNG image format.

member.name: F:Photostax.ImageFormat.Tiff
member.summary: TIFF image format.

member.name: F:Photostax.ImageFormat.Unknown
member.summary: Unknown image format.

member.name: T:Photostax.Metadata
member.summary: Metadata associated with a photo stack.

member.name: P:Photostax.Metadata.ExifTags
member.summary: Gets the EXIF tags.

member.name: P:Photostax.Metadata.XmpTags
member.summary: Gets the XMP tags.

member.name: P:Photostax.Metadata.CustomTags
member.summary: Gets the custom tags.

member.name: M:Photostax.Metadata.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Photostax.Metadata.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified tags.

member.name: M:Photostax.Metadata.WithCustomTag(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Creates a new metadata instance with the specified custom tag added or updated.
member.returns: A new metadata instance with the updated custom tag.

member.name: M:Photostax.Metadata.FromJson(System.String)
member.summary: Parses metadata from a JSON string.

member.name: M:Photostax.Metadata.ToJson
member.summary: Serializes the metadata to a JSON string.

member.name: T:Photostax.Native.NativeMethods
member.summary: P/Invoke declarations for the photostax_ffi native library.

member.name: M:Photostax.Native.NativeMethods.photostax_repo_open(System.String)
member.summary: Create a new repository from a directory path.

member.name: M:Photostax.Native.NativeMethods.photostax_repo_free(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Free a repository handle.

member.name: M:Photostax.Native.NativeMethods.photostax_repo_scan(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Scan the repository and return all photo stacks.

member.name: M:Photostax.Native.NativeMethods.photostax_repo_get_stack(System.IntPtr,System.String)
member.summary: Get a single stack by ID.

member.name: M:Photostax.Native.NativeMethods.photostax_read_image(System.IntPtr,System.String,System.IntPtr@,System.UIntPtr@)
member.summary: Read image bytes.

member.name: M:Photostax.Native.NativeMethods.photostax_write_metadata(System.IntPtr,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Write metadata to a stack.

member.name: M:Photostax.Native.NativeMethods.photostax_search(System.IntPtr,System.String)
member.summary: Search/filter stacks.

member.name: M:Photostax.Native.NativeMethods.photostax_get_metadata(System.IntPtr,System.String)
member.summary: Get metadata for a stack as a JSON string.

member.name: M:Photostax.Native.NativeMethods.photostax_get_exif_tag(System.IntPtr,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get a specific EXIF tag value.

member.name: M:Photostax.Native.NativeMethods.photostax_get_custom_tag(System.IntPtr,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get a specific custom tag value as JSON.

member.name: M:Photostax.Native.NativeMethods.photostax_set_custom_tag(System.IntPtr,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Set a custom tag value.

member.name: M:Photostax.Native.NativeMethods.photostax_stack_array_free(Photostax.Native.FfiPhotoStackArray)
member.summary: Free a photo stack array.

member.name: M:Photostax.Native.NativeMethods.photostax_stack_free(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Free a single photo stack.

member.name: M:Photostax.Native.NativeMethods.photostax_string_free(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Free a string allocated by photostax.

member.name: M:Photostax.Native.NativeMethods.photostax_bytes_free(System.IntPtr,System.UIntPtr)
member.summary: Free a byte buffer allocated by photostax.

member.name: T:Photostax.Native.FfiResult
member.summary: FFI result type for operations that may fail.

member.name: F:Photostax.Native.FfiResult.Success
member.summary: True if the operation succeeded.

member.name: F:Photostax.Native.FfiResult.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Error message (null on success, must be freed on failure).

member.name: T:Photostax.Native.FfiPhotoStack
member.summary: A photo stack returned across FFI.

member.name: F:Photostax.Native.FfiPhotoStack.Id
member.summary: Stack identifier (never null).

member.name: F:Photostax.Native.FfiPhotoStack.Original
member.summary: Path to original image (null if absent).

member.name: F:Photostax.Native.FfiPhotoStack.Enhanced
member.summary: Path to enhanced image (null if absent).

member.name: F:Photostax.Native.FfiPhotoStack.Back
member.summary: Path to back image (null if absent).

member.name: F:Photostax.Native.FfiPhotoStack.MetadataJson
member.summary: JSON-serialized metadata (never null, may be "{}").

member.name: T:Photostax.Native.FfiPhotoStackArray
member.summary: Array of photo stacks from FFI.

member.name: F:Photostax.Native.FfiPhotoStackArray.Data
member.summary: Pointer to array of stacks (null if len == 0).

member.name: F:Photostax.Native.FfiPhotoStackArray.Len
member.summary: Number of stacks in the array.

member.name: T:Photostax.Native.RepoSafeHandle
member.summary: Safe handle for repository pointers.

member.name: M:Photostax.Native.RepoSafeHandle.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new repository safe handle.

member.name: M:Photostax.Native.RepoSafeHandle.FromPointer(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Creates a safe handle from a raw pointer.

member.name: T:Photostax.Native.StackSafeHandle
member.summary: Safe handle for stack pointers.

member.name: M:Photostax.Native.StackSafeHandle.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new stack safe handle.

member.name: M:Photostax.Native.StackSafeHandle.FromPointer(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Creates a safe handle from a raw pointer.

member.name: T:Photostax.Native.StringSafeHandle
member.summary: Safe handle for string pointers.

member.name: M:Photostax.Native.StringSafeHandle.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new string safe handle.

member.name: M:Photostax.Native.StringSafeHandle.FromPointer(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Creates a safe handle from a raw pointer.

member.name: M:Photostax.Native.StringSafeHandle.GetString
member.summary: Gets the string value from the handle.

member.name: T:Photostax.Native.BytesSafeHandle
member.summary: Safe handle for byte buffer pointers.

member.name: M:Photostax.Native.BytesSafeHandle.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new bytes safe handle.

member.name: P:Photostax.Native.BytesSafeHandle.Length
member.summary: Gets the length of the byte buffer.

member.name: M:Photostax.Native.BytesSafeHandle.FromPointer(System.IntPtr,System.UIntPtr)
member.summary: Creates a safe handle from a raw pointer and length.

member.name: M:Photostax.Native.BytesSafeHandle.ToArray
member.summary: Gets the byte array from the handle.

member.name: T:Photostax.PhotoStack
member.summary: Represents a photo stack with its associated images and metadata.

member.name: P:Photostax.PhotoStack.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier for this stack.

member.name: P:Photostax.PhotoStack.OriginalPath
member.summary: Gets the path to the original image, or null if not present.

member.name: P:Photostax.PhotoStack.EnhancedPath
member.summary: Gets the path to the enhanced image, or null if not present.

member.name: P:Photostax.PhotoStack.BackPath
member.summary: Gets the path to the back image, or null if not present.

member.name: P:Photostax.PhotoStack.Metadata
member.summary: Gets the metadata associated with this stack.

member.name: P:Photostax.PhotoStack.HasAnyImage
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this stack has any image.

member.name: P:Photostax.PhotoStack.Format
member.summary: Gets the image format, or null if no images are present.

member.name: M:Photostax.PhotoStack.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,Photostax.Metadata)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Photostax.PhotostaxException
member.summary: Exception thrown when a Photostax operation fails.

member.name: M:Photostax.PhotostaxException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Photostax.PhotostaxException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a message.

member.name: M:Photostax.PhotostaxException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a message and inner exception.

member.name: T:Photostax.PhotostaxRepository
member.summary: Represents a local photo repository.

member.name: M:Photostax.PhotostaxRepository.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The path to the repository directory.
member.exception: Thrown when the repository cannot be opened.

member.name: M:Photostax.PhotostaxRepository.Scan
member.summary: Scans the repository and returns all photo stacks.
member.returns: A list of photo stacks found in the repository.
member.exception: Thrown when the repository has been disposed.

member.name: M:Photostax.PhotostaxRepository.GetStack(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a single photo stack by its identifier.
member.exception: Thrown when the stack is not found.
Thrown when the repository has been disposed.

member.name: M:Photostax.PhotostaxRepository.ReadImage(System.String)
member.summary: Reads the bytes of an image file.
member.param: The path to the image file.
member.exception: Thrown when the image cannot be read.
Thrown when the repository has been disposed.

member.name: M:Photostax.PhotostaxRepository.WriteMetadata(System.String,Photostax.Metadata)
member.summary: Writes metadata to a photo stack.
member.exception: Thrown when the metadata cannot be written.
Thrown when the repository has been disposed.

member.name: M:Photostax.PhotostaxRepository.Search(Photostax.SearchQuery)
member.summary: Searches for photo stacks matching the specified query.
member.returns: A list of matching photo stacks.
member.exception: Thrown when the repository has been disposed.

member.name: M:Photostax.PhotostaxRepository.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the repository and releases all resources.

member.name: T:Photostax.SearchQuery
member.summary: Builder for search queries.

member.name: M:Photostax.SearchQuery.WithText(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a text search filter.

member.name: M:Photostax.SearchQuery.WithExifFilter(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds an EXIF tag filter.

member.name: M:Photostax.SearchQuery.WithCustomFilter(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a custom tag filter.

member.name: M:Photostax.SearchQuery.WithHasBack(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Filters by whether the stack has a back image.
member.param: True to require back image, false to exclude it.

member.name: M:Photostax.SearchQuery.WithHasEnhanced(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Filters by whether the stack has an enhanced image.
member.param: True to require enhanced image, false to exclude it.

member.name: M:Photostax.SearchQuery.ToJson
member.summary: Serializes the query to JSON for FFI.
